data.title: WEIZE Kids Bikes,Boy's Bike for Kids,BMX Style Bicycle for Boys Girls Ages 4-12 Years Old,Kids Bicycle with Adjustable Seat,T

features: Safe Riding Guarantee:The kid bike is designed with a dual system of handbrake and foot brake for children
and even young or weak children can use the foot brake to brake smoothly. Fully enclosed chain guard
effectively preventing pants legs and skirts from being caught up
Durable And Easy To Maintain:The bicycle for boys girls adopts a high carbon steel frame
and long-lasting. The front and rear fenders are fully protected
preventing mud and water from splashing and dirtying clothes
making daily maintenance worry free and effortless.
Accompanying Children's Growth:The 16 inch kid bicycle comes standard with detachable auxiliary wheels
which are more stable during the beginner stage and can be removed after proficiency. Adjustable seats without tools and manually adjustable height
easily adapting to the cycling needs of children of different ages.
Scientific Age Matching:We offer boy bikes in two sizes: 16 inches and 20 inches. 16 inches are suitable for 4-6 years old (height 43-49 inches)
20 inches are suitable for 6-12 years old (height 46-56 inches)
and there are three color options for bicycles to meet individual preferences.
Quick Installation Experience:This children's bike is 85% pre installed and comes with clear instructions and online assembly video guidance. It can be easily installed in about 20 minutes
